title: Summer Resort Travel Poster AI
sourceTitle: Summer Resort Travel Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable premium cultural travel poster with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable premium cultural travel poster built around Kyoto. signature elements: destination-specific landmark, cultural atmosphere, title-ready poster hierarchy, and travel-campaign finish worldbuilding: wooden machiya street and lanterns and Gion Matsuri evening parade must be specific enough to make the destination recognizable composition: 4:5 composition, poster-first hierarchy, dominant hero image, secondary detail layers, and a clean title-ready area. style: Premium cultural tourism campaign poster style with destination-specific landmarks, local festival atmosphere, refined title hierarchy, and collectible travel-magazine finish. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition, avoid real logos and replace brands with fictional or generic marks when publishing subject: Kyoto as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable scene: Gion Matsuri evening parade defines the surrounding context, supporting details, and sense of place lighting: lighting supports the template mood with controlled highlights, readable details, and no overexposed glow camera: camera crop and viewpoint are chosen to keep the subject readable and preserve the source prompt perspective typography: visible text must be short, intentional, readable, and limited to the specified title, labels, UI regions, or annotations. poster title: "KYOTO" Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
